feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Report to find authorized Fiori apps for user's in SAP S/4HANA On-premise system
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there a standard report available that provides a list of all authorized Fiori applications for a specific user? I have tried using tcode: /ui2/flc, but it doesn't seem relevant. I also checked the AGR_BUFFI table, but the data does not match the authorized applications.

Could you please assist me with this?

Thank you!

entry.title: PO and STO in the same shipment
entry.content:
Hi,

The SAP Help is telling that InBound Deliveries (IBD) and OutBound ones (OBD) can't be placed together in the same shipment.

As the business is raising this as a requirement, in order to optimize the shipments, I would like to ask if anyone achieved this in specific.

Thanks in advance

BR

Yan

entry.title: Document Splitting issue - profit center not updating in all the line items
entry.content: Document Splitting issue - The profit centre is not updating in all the line items which are causing issue with the trial balance, During the clearing of invoices using payment run payment document not capturing the profit center in some of the vendor line items and GST line items

entry.title: S/4 HANA Application job scheduling based on condition/event
entry.content:
Hi,

S/4 HANA private cloud system.

We are checking the option to schedule the S/4 HANA application job based on some condition/event because we are having some dependency from other systems job completion status (SuccessFactor, IBP, etc.,) .

We didn't see the event/condition based scheduling options in Application Jobs FIORI app.

Is there any possibility to start S/4 HANA application jobs based on completion of dependency jobs from other systems?

Best Regards,

Anand

entry.title: Purchase Order Split based on Plant ( Site )
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a requirement, User need : While PO creation ,if the PO has two line items one with Plant A and another with Plant B , then the PO has to be split into two new POs based on the new different plants. 

Actually the user is using the standard Fiori app " Manage Purchase Orders " to create new Pos.

I can't able to find any enhancement or Badi in S4 to achieve this requirement. I have logic in my hand but i don't know where it can be placed so that the split can be done successfully.  

Can experts help on this?

entry.title: Withholding tax not calculated in a SD invoice
entry.content:
WITHOLDING TAX NOT INTEGRATED BETWEEN FI & SD at S/4 HANA

 

 

We have configured the Extended Withholding tax calculation for Spain in the SPRO with a completely set for FI and SD 

 

The TWES is a standard condition price which has been use for the price in the SD orders

 

 

 

When we try to post a new order the withholding condition type is detected in the order but is not calculated in the final invoice in the SD module.

 

SD ORDERSD INVOICE

The   invoice don´t  has the corresponding withholding line …only VAT is calculated

 

FI-AR  FB70 invoice

On the opposite side we can calculate a FI-AR invoice by using the TCODE FB70 with the withholding tax froM the same customer configured in the master data 

The FB70 triggers a pop up telling that withholding tax is mandatory for this customer, we enter the base amount  in the WHT tag and the withholding tax calcultio line apperars in the FI document.

 

 

The final posting document with the WHT calculation

entry.title: User needs only display access in EDOC_COCKPIT tcode/app in SAP S4 Hana Production.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We received a request from the user who needs only display access in EDOC_COCKPIT tcode/app for Spain entity in SAP S4 Hana Production.

We tested the EDOC_COCKPIT tcode/app in the QS4 Test environment, and it allows all operations, including change/cancel/delete/submit. Even activity is limited with "Display".

Could you please check and let us know if there is any feasibility to restrict only display version.

Regards,

Srinu Nelli

SAP Security & GRC

entry.title: IGS very broken!
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In one of our systems, IGS is very broken and we need to fix it, however we're out of ideas...
Transaction SIGS says it can't connect to IGS. The RFC destination doesn't work:

 

How can we register it ? The reginfo and secinfo files allow every connection. We have tried restarting the Gateway in transaction SMGW without any success.

When running the command:

rfcexec -a IGS.<SID> -g hostname -x sapgw01

the RFC starts working, but as soon as we hit Ctrl+C to exit the process, the RFC stops working again.
And even while the RFC is working under the influence of the rfcexec command, the SIGS transaction is
showing the following error:

We keep searching on the SAP Marketplace and on google, but we can't find a solution that could help us to 
fix IGS in this particular system. This is an S/4 Hana 2023 system running on Linux. Please advise, many thanks!

entry.title: SAP OCI catalog - support SSO integartion
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have received a request from a vendor to to set up an OCI Catalog and they would like SSO integration.

We would like to check if if SAP OCI catalog can support SSO integration if vendor is capable of supporting SSO (SAML).

Any document to guide us will be really helpful.

Looking forward to your assistance.

entry.title: SAP CPI--> S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

I'm new to S4 HANA integrations. I want to upload exchange rate data from an API into a table in SAP S/4 HANA via SAP CPI. My question is how can we setup connectivity with S/4 HANA and post the data to that particular TCURR table. Also, which receiver adapter is best suited for this scenario. 

Kindly help with your inputs.

Thank you,

Sri

entry.title: Sales Pricing analysis Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like to understand if there is a similar Pricing analysis functionality available in any of the Sales Fiori apps.  Does anyone have any idea or know how to achieve similar functionality in Fiori? Thank you in advance.

 

   

BR, Sampath

entry.title: Re-creating a Custom Field with the Same Name After Deletion in S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content: I have a question regarding the on-premise version of S/4HANA(2023). In the Custom Field app, is it possible to delete a field that has been extended and then re-create it with the same name? For instance, if the field type was incorrectly registered, I believe it would be necessary to re-register it.

entry.title: Best Practices for Data Migration in a Carve-Out from S/4HANA On-Prem to S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, 

I’m currently working with a customer who is performing a carve-out, moving from their legacy S/4HANA On-Premise system to S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. As part of this project, they are facing challenges in identifying the relevant data tables for migration and pinpointing where exactly the necessary data resides in their existing system. I’d like to reach out to this community for any best practices or lessons learned from similar carve-out scenarios.

  • The new system will be based on S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, so we are focusing on a clean and efficient transition.
  • The legacy system is S/4HANA On-Premise, with years of data accumulated. The customer is unsure about the best approach to identify and extract only the necessary data for migration. 

Challenges:


  1. 1. Identifying relevant tables: The customer is unsure about which tables to migrate and how to locate the key tables in their On-Premise system.
    2. Data relevance: There’s some confusion around how to extract **only the relevant data**, without transferring unnecessary historical data.
    3. Table mapping for migration tools: Aligning On-Prem tables with SAP Migration Cockpit templates and the standard migration objects available for the Cloud edition has also proven to be challenging.

Key Questions:

  • What best practices exist for identifying and mapping the critical tables in S/4HANA On-Prem for a carve-out scenario?
  • Are there any efficient methodologies or tools that can help pinpoint relevant data and ensure it aligns with the S/4HANA Cloud public edition data structure?
  • How do you ensure the customer extracts only the required data, avoiding clutter or excessive historical records? 

I’d appreciate any advice, strategies, or best practices that you have found effective in your own experience—particularly in scenarios where S/4HANA On-Prem is being transitioned to the public Cloud edition. We want to ensure that our data migration is as clean and efficient as possible.

Thanks in advance for your input!

Best regards,
Yannick

entry.title: T093B - Asset Accounting table issue
difficulties to tracking the alignment between the requirements and the material provided by PPC
entry.content: we need a report detailing the actual requirement punched into SAP by the Sales & Marketing team in T.code- MC87, along with the corresponding 101 movements done by the PPC department. Please assist us by generating this report so that we can ensure accuracy and consistency between the requirements and material allocations.

entry.title: Optimizing Data Load for Large Replication Flow Object
entry.content:
Good day All,

I have a quick question regarding the optimization of data loading for a replication flow object containing over 400 million records. The object in question is the CDS view I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA, which includes 348 columns.

We are using replication flows to transfer data from an on-premise S/4HANA system to Datasphere, utilizing an initial + delta load method.

I started the flow on Wednesday, but it stalled and ultimately failed on Thursday night after loading 170 million records out of the expected 400 million. The flow was stopped and then restarted. It is now presenting the following errors in Datasphere and S/4 HANA

SAP Datasphere:

S4 (Transaction code DHCDCMON )

Does anyone have suggestions or experience with optimizing the load process for such a large data set?

Thank you in advance for your guidance!

SAP Datasphere

SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

 

My name is Felicia Bennett, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I am a U.S. Navy veteran with a background in sales and data. 

 

I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in Sales. 

 

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because over the course of my career I have assisted with the integration of systems and data for sales growth for multiple companies and I have a deep passion to learn more and only get better!

 

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in Sales and AI. Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

 

Best regards,  

Felicia Bennett

entry.title: Exposed SAP S/4HANA Federated content in SAP Workzone give Internal Server Error
entry.content:
Hi,
I have followed the below tutorial to expose my S/4HANA system fiori applications to SAP Workzone.
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-launchpad-federation-expose-content.html 
S/4HANA system details:
version : 2023
UI5:
Workzone:1.129.0
S/4HANA:1.120.0.

The apps are visible in Work-zone as tiles, but when I open , it gives "Internal Server error".
Not sure whether the workzone and S/4HANA UI5 versions should be same

1. Workzone

2. After opening the app

3. Network tab

Updated

4. Console error

entry.title: Custom CDN is not working
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We are implementing customer CDN on AWS platform the CDN url is working well but when integrated to the SAP S/4HANA not working.

 

After configured the customer CDN, the S/4HANA fiori launchpad URL is not accessible. (see attachment)

 

Kindly suggest?

 

Best


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sequencing/Scheduling with user defined fields in S4 PPDS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Need help to understand which is the feasible options to consider below mentioned scheduling/sequencing scenario

We have a scenario where we do sequencing of order based on user defined fields that do not appear on the sort list.

 

1. Work with routing classification - 018 Class type (Without Block planning)

For this we wanted to use Routing classification at operation level by defining the user defined attributes as characteristics in this routing class. But we do not want to use this routing classification for Block planning. We want to use these characteristics for a time continuous resource sequencing. Please let us know if this is a feasible approach.

 

2. Consider Routing operation User field Key:

Also apart from the above option we are also considering usage of routing operation user field keys to define these attributes as user fields. And use the CIF BAPIs to send these user defined fields to PPDS and make them populate them at order level and add them in the sort list of sequencing heuristics.

 

3. Use Material Mater Characteristics - Material Class:

Use Material classification by defining the user defined attributes as characteristics in material class. CIF these relevant characteristics to PPDS and make them populate at Order level and add them in the sort list of sequencing heuristics

__PRESENT
